---
name: Documentation
about: Improve documentation, examples, or docstrings
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## Type of Improvement

- [ ] Fix incorrect or outdated documentation
- [ ] Add missing documentation
- [ ] Improve docstrings
- [ ] Add or improve examples
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Current State

What exists now (if applicable). Include file paths and line numbers.

## Proposed Improvement

What should be changed or added. Be specific about:

- Which files or sections need updates
- What content should be added or corrected
- Code examples if relevant

## Why This Matters

How this helps users or contributors understand or use odys better.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have identified the specific files/sections to update
- [ ] I have clearly described the proposed improvement
